caribbean.headline: Tropical Weather Hits Caribbean
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 75% rain probability with winds reaching 24 kt and wave heights of 6.6 ft, while Grand Cayman has a less intense weather system with winds of 17 kt. I expect the strong winds and high wave heights in Roatan to impact port operations, with the dominant swell direction coming from the ENE at a swell period of 9 s.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing 75% rain probability with winds at 11 kt and wave heights of 1.6 ft, while Cadiz has winds reaching 15 kt. I expect these conditions to impact marine activities, particularly in the Central Mediterranean, where Venice is a key port, with less severe conditions in the Western Mediterranean near Cadiz.
